subject: [VID] Don't hardcode mariadb-galera password
commit_message:
[VID] Don't hardcode mariadb-galera password

Let's use common secret template to generate user credentials for VID
DB and depend on mariadb-galera to generate secure enough root
password.

Issue-ID: OOM-2293
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ib474e202e9e35e6b2959d29648f542a89c87a4e5

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 1:

Thanks, Krzysztof!

I'm trying to understand, but feeling bit lost with the solution:

1) Where the DB `userPassword` is generated?
2) What is `userCredentialsExternalSecret`?

Patch Set 1:

@Ittay

1) User password is generated in a common secret tamplate based on values from secrets: list. For ore details you can take a look to _secret.tpl file in common

2) So the password field allows user to override auto-generated password using a string and ...ExternalSecret fields allows to override credentials by providing name of secret that already contains those credentials.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1:

will as soon as we have ittay +1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> will as soon as we have ittay +1

I will try to understand the mechanism further, but this should not block us from merging.
If it works, I'm cool with it.

I do understand that as a deployer I have 3 options:
1) Provide my secret (and set its name in .Values.config.db.userCredentialsExternalSecret
2) Provide my password (and set its value in .Values.config.db.userPassword
3) Go with default, which is a generated password unique to VID (not shared with other components).

Correct?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

thanks a lot
